text: 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Trump says Iran committed “to never close the Strait of Hormuz again” 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 特朗普称伊朗承诺“永远不再关闭霍尔木兹海峡” 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇺🇸🇮🇷 IDF Chief of Staff Eyal Zamir has ordered the IDF to prepare for a campaign against Iran with a target readiness date between June and November 2026. The map of Iran was divided into sectors: western Iran for the IDF alone; Tehran and central Iran…" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 Admin note: The posts above represent the most current operational data released by the Israeli military. You may ask, what does this mean? In the short term, the IDF remains on high alert for a potential resumption of fighting in Iran and Lebanon, with a new target bank including energy infrastructure approved if U.S.-Iran talks fail. The ceasefire in Lebanon allows ground forces to hold a “yellow line” buffer zone but restricts airstrikes deep into the country. In the long term, the IDF assesses that Iran’s nuclear program can only be rolled back by removing enriched material and destroying underground infrastructure. Despite heavy economic damage (estimated at $100–600 billion), Iran could rebuild its ballistic missile arsenal within a few years if restrictions are not imposed. The survival of Mojtaba Khamenei, though allegedly wounded and in hiding, leaves the Iranian government intact, failing one of the war's main goals of regime change. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇺🇸🇮🇷 以色列国防军总参谋长埃亚尔·扎米尔（Eyal Zamir）已下令以色列国防军为针对伊朗的军事行动做好准备，目标准备日期定于2026年6月至11月之间。伊朗地图被划分为多个区域：伊朗西部由以色列国防军单独负责；德黑兰和伊朗中部……” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 管理员注：以上帖子代表了以色列军方发布的最新作战数据。你可能会问，这意味着什么？短期内，以色列国防军对伊朗和黎巴嫩可能恢复战斗保持高度戒备，如果美伊谈判失败，新的目标库将包括能源基础设施。黎巴嫩停火协议允许地面部队维持一条“黄线”缓冲区，但限制了对该国深处的空袭。长期来看，以色列国防军评估认为，只有通过清除浓缩材料和摧毁地下基础设施，才能扭转伊朗的核计划。尽管遭受了严重的经济损失（估计为1000亿至6000亿美元），但如果不对伊朗实施限制，它可能在几年内重建其弹道导弹库。莫杰塔巴·哈梅内伊（Mojtaba Khamenei）虽然据称受伤并躲藏起来，但他的幸存使得伊朗政府得以完整保留，这使得战争的主要目标之一——政权更迭——未能实现。 @wfwitness

text: Keir Starmer: Today we announced our joint plan with France and other international partners to protect freedom of navigation.
text_zh: 基尔·斯塔默：今天我们宣布了与法国及其他国际伙伴的联合计划，以保护航行自由。

text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "🇮🇷 From Fars News: Officials! At least explain the reason for your “lack of explanation” Simultaneously with the Foreign Minister’s unexpected tweet about the opening of the Strait of Hormuz, followed by Trump’s heated rhetoric, Iranian society has been…" 🇮🇷 The outrage from Iranian media is understandable. There have been no clear statements from Iranian officials since Araghchi’s posts, while Trump has continued posting repeated, extraordinary claims without any visible response or clarification from the Iranian side. As a result, the narrative around the alleged deal and the opening of the Strait of Hormuz has largely been shaped by Trump, with little to no counter-messaging or official explanation from Iran. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 DD Geopolitics：“🇮🇷 来自法尔斯通讯社：官员们！至少解释一下你们‘缺乏解释’的原因。在外交部长就霍尔木兹海峡开放发表意外推文，随后特朗普发表激烈言论的同时，伊朗社会一直……” 🇮🇷 伊朗媒体的愤怒是可以理解的。自阿拉格齐（Araghchi）发帖以来，伊朗官员没有发表任何明确声明，而特朗普继续发布重复的、非同寻常的声明，伊朗方面没有任何可见的回应或澄清。因此，围绕所谓协议和霍尔木兹海峡开放的叙事在很大程度上是由特朗普塑造的，伊朗几乎没有反驳信息或官方解释。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "🇮🇷 From Tasnim News: Criticism of an incomplete and misleading tweet by Araghchi regarding the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz Seyed Abbas Araghchi, Iran’s Foreign Minister, tweeted a short time ago that following the ceasefire in Lebanon, the Strait of…" 🇮🇷 From Fars News: Officials! At least explain the reason for your “lack of explanation” Simultaneously with the Foreign Minister’s unexpected tweet about the opening of the Strait of Hormuz, followed by Trump’s heated rhetoric, Iranian society has been plunged into confusion. International analysts interpret the recent behavior of the U.S. president as a sign of frustration in dealing with Iran’s complex situation. However, what has caused even greater concern among people inside the country is the absolute and unusual silence of the Supreme National Security Council and the negotiating team. Citizens emphasize that they trust officials to observe the system’s red lines and exercise proper judgment, but they expect at least a clear explanation for the “reason for silence.” Public opinion raises the question: if it is in the country’s interest not to disclose details of negotiations or recent developments, why is the reason for this lack of transparency not itself explained to the public? People understand that revealing Iran’s goals and plans would also inform its adversaries, and they do not expect disclosure of sensitive secrets in such circumstances. However, they ask officials not to allow the enemy’s narrative and hostile media to fill the information vacuum and manipulate public sentiment. In these days, Twitter and short statements are not suitable tools for convincing domestic public opinion; even this “lack of explanation” itself requires explanation. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 DD Geopolitics：“🇮🇷 来自塔斯尼姆通讯社：对阿拉格齐关于重新开放霍尔木兹海峡的不完整且具有误导性的推文的批评。伊朗外交部长赛义德·阿巴斯·阿拉格齐不久前发推文称，在黎巴嫩停火后，海峡……” 🇮🇷 来自法尔斯通讯社：官员们！至少解释一下你们“缺乏解释”的原因。在外交部长就霍尔木兹海峡开放发表意外推文，随后特朗普发表激烈言论的同时，伊朗社会陷入了困惑。国际分析人士将美国总统近期的行为解读为在处理伊朗复杂局势时感到沮丧的迹象。然而，引起国内民众更大担忧的是最高国家安全委员会和谈判团队绝对且不同寻常的沉默。公民们强调，他们相信官员会遵守系统的红线并做出正确的判断，但他们至少期待对“沉默的原因”有一个明确的解释。公众提出了一个问题：如果为了国家利益不披露谈判细节或近期进展，为什么不向公众解释这种缺乏透明度的原因本身？人们理解，揭露伊朗的目标和计划也会让对手知晓，在这种情况下，他们并不期望披露敏感秘密。然而，他们要求官员不要让敌人的叙事和敌对媒体填补信息真空并操纵公众情绪。在这些日子里，推特和简短的声明不是说服国内公众舆论的合适工具；即使是这种“缺乏解释”本身也需要解释。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇮🇷 From Tasnim News: Criticism of an incomplete and misleading tweet by Araghchi regarding the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz Seyed Abbas Araghchi, Iran’s Foreign Minister, tweeted a short time ago that following the ceasefire in Lebanon, the Strait of Hormuz would be fully open for commercial shipping for the remainder of the ceasefire period. The tweet, which was published without sufficient explanation, created various ambiguities regarding the conditions, details, and mechanisms of passage, and drew significant criticism. At the same time, there are several conditions attached to this issue, one of the most important being the full monitoring of ship traffic by Iran’s armed forces. The passage would also be considered void if the alleged maritime blockade continues. The publication of this tweet, without any accompanying verbal explanation or at least sufficient written clarification, is considered a complete failure in communication. It is evident that either the Foreign Ministry must revise its approach to such announcements, or the Supreme National Security Council Secretariat must fulfill its duty by providing proper information management and establishing a more coordinated framework for public communication by institutions, including the Foreign Ministry. Tweets published by officials, even if written in English, are not seen only by foreign officials. The Iranian public also closely follows these developments as part of its revolutionary duty. Any creation of concern or disappointment among the nation is considered a form of political wrongdoing and a disruption of national unity. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 来自塔斯尼姆通讯社：对阿拉格齐关于重新开放霍尔木兹海峡的不完整且具有误导性的推文的批评。伊朗外交部长赛义德·阿巴斯·阿拉格齐不久前发推文称，在黎巴嫩停火后，霍尔木兹海峡将在停火期间的剩余时间内完全开放供商业航运。这条推文在没有充分解释的情况下发布，在通行的条件、细节和机制方面造成了各种歧义，并引起了广泛批评。同时，这个问题还附带了几个条件，其中最重要的一点是伊朗武装部队对船舶交通的全面监控。如果所谓的海上封锁继续存在，该通行权也将被视为无效。在没有任何口头解释或至少足够的书面澄清的情况下发布这条推文，被认为是沟通上的彻底失败。显而易见，要么外交部必须修改其处理此类公告的方式，要么最高国家安全委员会秘书处必须履行其职责，提供适当的信息管理，并为包括外交部在内的机构建立一个更协调的公共沟通框架。官员发布的推文，即使是用英语写的，也不仅仅是给外国官员看的。伊朗公众也作为其革命职责的一部分密切关注这些事态发展。在国民中制造任何担忧或失望都被视为一种政治错误，是对国家团结的破坏。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Trump: The Failing New York Times, FAKE NEWS CNN, and others, just don’t know what to do. They are desperately looking for a reason to criticize President Donald J. Trump on the Iran situation, but just can’t find it. Why don’t they just say, at the right time, JOB WELL DONE, MR. PRESIDENT, and start to gain back their credibility???
text_zh: 特朗普：失败的《纽约时报》、假新闻CNN和其他媒体，就是不知道该怎么办。他们拼命寻找理由在伊朗问题上批评唐纳德·J·特朗普总统，但就是找不到。他们为什么不在适当的时候说一句“干得好，总统先生”，并开始挽回他们的信誉呢？？？

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇷 Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi says passage for all commercial vessels through the Strait of Hormuz is “completely open” for the remaining period of the ceasefire. He states vessels are to use the coordinated route already announced by Iran’s…" ⚡️ 🇬🇧 🇫🇷 🇮🇷 British Prime Minister Starmer welcomed the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz to commercial vessels. He added that today Britain and France have announced their joint plan to ensure freedom of navigation in the Strait alongside international partners. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇷 伊朗外交部长阿巴斯·阿拉格齐表示，所有商船通过霍尔木兹海峡的通道在停火期间的剩余时间内是‘完全开放’的。他表示，船只应使用伊朗已经宣布的协调路线……” ⚡️ 🇬🇧 🇫🇷 🇮🇷 英国首相斯塔默对霍尔木兹海峡重新向商船开放表示欢迎。他补充说，今天英国和法国宣布了他们与国际伙伴一起确保海峡航行自由的联合计划。 @wfwitness

text: Trump said Iran has agreed to stop enriching uranium, calling it a major step in ongoing negotiations. Asked directly, he replied, “Yes… Are you surprised?” and added, “I’m not surprised by anything.” Source: NewsNation
text_zh: 特朗普表示，伊朗已同意停止铀浓缩，称这是正在进行的谈判中的重大一步。当被直接问及时，他回答说：“是的……你感到惊讶吗？”并补充说，“我对任何事情都不感到惊讶。” 来源：NewsNation

text: Brazilian President Lula: We need to strengthen democracy in the world so that we do not allow regression. Because when there is regression, you get a Hitler, you get Nazism, you get fascism.
text_zh: 巴西总统卢拉：我们需要加强世界民主，以免我们允许倒退。因为当出现倒退时，你就会得到一个希特勒，你就会得到纳粹主义，你就会得到法西斯主义。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧🇱🇧 The Lebanon ceasefire follows the “yellow line” model from Gaza. Some 55 Lebanese villages are inside the zone; civilians may not return, and the IDF may continue destroying infrastructure during the truce. Hezbollah fired about 8,000 rockets…" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 IDF Chief of Staff Eyal Zamir ordered the IDF to prepare for a campaign against Iran with a target readiness date between June and November 2026. The map of Iran was divided into sectors: western Iran for the IDF alone; Tehran and central Iran for joint operations; southern and eastern Iran for the U.S. alone. In the four months before the war, the IDF doubled the number of targets in Iran by six to seven times. The opening strike was originally planned for Saturday night when Iran’s defence council and intelligence ministry leadership were meeting above ground. Mojtaba Khamenei was also a target; the IDF stated he is wounded, hiding, but still communicating and issuing orders – defined as “present‑absent”. During the war, the IDF eliminated approximately 1,000 “repression forces” (Basij and internal security), nine nuclear scientists, and destroyed both of Iran’s satellite launchers. Damage to Iranian industries is estimated at $100 billion, including 40% of steel production, 75% of petrochemicals, and 23% of gas processing. Energy facilities were not hit. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧🇱🇧 黎巴嫩停火协议遵循了加沙的‘黄线’模式。约有55个黎巴嫩村庄位于该区域内；平民不得返回，以色列国防军（IDF）在停火期间可继续摧毁基础设施。真主党发射了约8000枚火箭弹……” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 以色列国防军总参谋长埃亚尔·扎米尔（Eyal Zamir）下令IDF为针对伊朗的军事行动做准备，目标准备就绪日期定在2026年6月至11月之间。伊朗地图被划分为若干区域：伊朗西部由IDF单独负责；德黑兰和伊朗中部进行联合行动；伊朗南部和东部由美国单独负责。在战争爆发前的四个月里，IDF将伊朗境内的目标数量增加了六到七倍。最初计划在周六晚上发动首次打击，当时伊朗国防委员会和情报部领导层正在地面上开会。莫杰塔巴·哈梅内伊（Mojtaba Khamenei）也是目标；IDF称他已受伤，正在躲藏，但仍能进行沟通并发布命令——被定义为“在场但缺席”。战争期间，IDF消灭了约1000名“镇压部队”（巴斯基和内部安全人员）、九名核科学家，并摧毁了伊朗所有的两个卫星发射装置。伊朗工业损失估计为1000亿美元，包括40%的钢铁产量、75%的石化产品和23%的天然气加工能力。能源设施未受打击。 @wfwitness

text: How does it feel to be an account on X with pro-Russian and pro-Iranian views, while the product lead at X—who oversees engagement, Trust & Safety, and essentially the algorithm—is Nikita Bier, who is Jewish, of Ashkenazi heritage, and was raised in a Ukrainian-Jewish family... 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 作为一个在X上持有亲俄和亲伊观点的账号，而X的产品负责人——负责参与度、信任与安全以及算法的核心人物——是尼基塔·比尔（Nikita Bier），他是一位犹太人，拥有阿什肯纳兹血统，并在一个乌克兰犹太家庭中长大，这种感觉如何…… 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Spanish PM Pedro Sánchez: Access to pornographic content among young people — today in Spain, the average age is 11. This is not something minors seek out — these platforms expose them to violent and pornographic content, which objectifies women. Everything we are trying to achieve offline is undermined in what is, today, a kind of failed state: social media.
text_zh: 西班牙首相佩德罗·桑切斯：年轻人获取色情内容的情况——如今在西班牙，平均年龄为11岁。这不是未成年人主动寻求的——这些平台将他们暴露在暴力和色情内容中，这使女性物化。我们在现实生活中努力实现的一切，在如今这个某种意义上的失败国家——社交媒体——中都被破坏了。

text: Iranian official to Fars: If the maritime blockade continues, it will be considered a violation of the ceasefire, and the Strait of Hormuz transit route will be closed.
text_zh: 伊朗官员向法尔斯通讯社表示：如果海上封锁继续，将被视为违反停火协议，霍尔木兹海峡的过境路线将被关闭。

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : ❗️ 🇺🇸 Donald Trump: 📌 “The Strait of Hormuz is fully open and ready for commercial traffic, but the naval blockade will remain in place specifically against Iran until our deal is 100% finalized. This process should move very quickly, as agreement has already been reached on most issues.” See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 tweet
text_zh: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 ：❗️ 🇺🇸 唐纳德·特朗普：📌 “霍尔木兹海峡完全开放并准备好进行商业交通，但针对伊朗的海上封锁将继续实施，直到我们的协议100%最终确定。这一过程应该会非常迅速，因为大多数问题已经达成一致。” 查看我们的最新更新： @NSTRIKE1231 推文

text: Open Source Intel Trump: "The Failing New York Times, FAKE NEWS CNN, and others, just don’t know what to do. They are desperately looking for a reason to criticize President Donald J. Trump on the Iran situation, but just can’t find it. Why don’t they just say, at the right time, JOB WELL DONE, MR. PRESIDENT, and start to gain back their credibility???" tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 特朗普：“失败的《纽约时报》、假新闻CNN和其他媒体，根本不知道该怎么办。他们拼命寻找理由批评唐纳德·J·特朗普总统在伊朗局势上的表现，但就是找不到。他们为什么不在适当的时候说一句，干得好，总统先生，并开始挽回他们的信誉呢？？？” 推文

text: OSINTdefender RT @sentdefender : Pictures published by USA Today show meals served recently to Sailors onboard the Nimitz-class aircraft carrier, USS Abraham Lincoln (CVN-72), as well as Marines serving on the USS Tripoli (LHA-7), an America-class amphibious assault ship, both of which are currently deployed to the Arabian Sea in order to enforce the ongoing naval blockade against coastal areas of Iran. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender RT @sentdefender ：《今日美国》发布的照片显示了最近在尼米兹级航空母舰“亚伯拉罕·林肯”号（CVN-72）上为水手提供的餐食，以及在“的黎波里”号（LHA-7，美国级两栖攻击舰）上服役的海军陆战队员的餐食，这两艘舰船目前都部署在阿拉伯海，以执行针对伊朗沿海地区的持续海上封锁。 推文

text: Open Source Intel IRAN FARS NEWS : An informed source says the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz is tied to specific conditions and the ceasefire in Lebanon. If the U.S. maritime blockade continues, it will be considered a ceasefire violation, and transit through Hormuz will be shut down again. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 伊朗法尔斯通讯社：一位知情人士表示，霍尔木兹海峡的重新开放与特定条件及黎巴嫩停火协议挂钩。如果美国的海上封锁继续，将被视为违反停火协议，通过霍尔木兹海峡的过境将再次被关闭。 推文

text: Open Source Intel RT @Osint613 : Important points on the Hezbollah ceasefire: Israel explicitly preserves the right to strike at ANY TIME in self-defense against planned, imminent, or ongoing attacks or threats. So if Israel notices a Hezbollah member moving weapons in southern Lebanon, it will definitely drone him. This is the big one: Israeli forces are staying inside Lebanon, with no requirement to withdraw from a wide security zone. The IDF remains on the ground, holding key Hezbollah strongholds. Hezbollah was forced to agree to a ceasefire while Israel is still inside and in control. And lastly: Any future agreement with Lebanon would require Hezbollah to be dismantled. (Hard to believe, but we will see) A friend shared an interesting take on the Lebanon ceasefire. A little bit of cope, but maybe a possible option: Maybe Netanyahu wanted a short pause anyway. Independence Day is approaching and Israelis could use a moment to breathe. Announcing it himself would mean taking the political hit. So Trump makes the announcement. Netanyahu steps back and signals that after all the help the administration has done for Israel, refusing is not an option. - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel RT @Osint613 ：关于真主党停火协议的要点：以色列明确保留在任何时候针对计划中、迫在眉睫或正在进行的攻击或威胁进行自卫打击的权利。因此，如果以色列发现真主党成员在黎巴嫩南部运输武器，它肯定会用无人机将其消灭。这是最重要的一点：以色列军队将留在黎巴嫩境内，没有要求从广阔的安全区撤出。IDF仍留在地面，控制着真主党的关键据点。真主党被迫在以色列仍留在境内并保持控制的情况下同意停火。最后：未来与黎巴嫩的任何协议都将要求解散真主党。（很难相信，但我们会看到的）一位朋友分享了关于黎巴嫩停火协议的一个有趣观点。虽然有点自我安慰，但可能是一个选择：也许内塔尼亚胡本来就想要一个短暂的停顿。独立日临近，以色列人需要喘口气。由他自己宣布意味着要承担政治打击。所以特朗普宣布了。内塔尼亚胡退后一步，暗示在政府为以色列做了这么多帮助之后，拒绝是不可能的。 - Open Source Intel 推文

text: German Chancellor Merz: Iran must end its nuclear program. It must stop attacking Israel and the Gulf states. And it must reopen the Strait of Hormuz reliably, permanently, and without any form of payment.
text_zh: 德国总理默茨：伊朗必须结束其核计划。它必须停止攻击以色列和海湾国家。并且它必须可靠、永久且无需任何形式的支付地重新开放霍尔木兹海峡。

text: OSINTdefender Under the agreement, Iran would be allowed to have nuclear research reactors for the production of medical isotopes, but would pledge that all of its nuclear facilities would be above ground, while existing underground facilities would remain out of commission, including the ones destroyed in last year’s Operation Midnight Hammer. The United States and Iran have made progress in the negotiations over a three-page memorandum of understanding to end the ongoing war, which will include a “voluntary” multi-year ban on Iranian nuclear enrichment and the removal of some highly-enriched uranium to a third country, in exchange for the return of billions in frozen funding to Iran, U.S. officials and sources with knowledge tell Axios. - OSINTdefender tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 根据协议，伊朗将被允许拥有用于生产医用同位素的核研究反应堆，但承诺其所有核设施都将在地面上，而现有的地下设施将保持停用，包括去年“午夜之锤”行动中被摧毁的那些。美国和伊朗在关于结束当前战争的三页谅解备忘录的谈判中取得了进展，其中包括“自愿”多年禁止伊朗核浓缩，并将部分高浓缩铀转移到第三国，以换取解冻伊朗数十亿美元的资金，美国官员和知情人士告诉Axios。 - OSINTdefender 推文

text: Open Source Intel BREAKING 🔴 🔴 NOW: Lebanese media report 1 person killed in an Israeli drone strike targeting a motorcycle between the southern towns of Kounine and Beit Yahoun. No immediate comment from the IDF. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 快讯 🔴 🔴 现在：黎巴嫩媒体报道称，在库宁（Kounine）和拜特亚洪（Beit Yahoun）南部城镇之间，一架以色列无人机袭击了一辆摩托车，造成1人死亡。IDF暂无评论。 推文

text: OSINTdefender The United States and Iran have made progress in the negotiations over a three-page memorandum of understanding to end the ongoing war, which will include a “voluntary” multi-year ban on Iranian nuclear enrichment and the removal of some highly-enriched uranium to a third country, in exchange for the return of billions in frozen funding to Iran, U.S. officials and sources with knowledge tell Axios. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 美国和伊朗在关于结束当前战争的三页谅解备忘录的谈判中取得了进展，其中包括“自愿”多年禁止伊朗核浓缩，并将部分高浓缩铀转移到第三国，以换取解冻伊朗数十亿美元的资金，美国官员和知情人士告诉Axios。 推文

text: Open Source Intel ICYMI: Iranian MP Nabavian says Tehran plans to impose fees on merchant ships transiting the Strait of Hormuz. JUST IN 🔴 Iran parliament member Mahmoud Nabavian: Ships can pass by paying tolls. “With the retreat of the evil US regime and acceptance of a ceasefire in Lebanon, some commercial ships will be allowed to pass through the Strait of Hormuz by PAYING TOLLS.” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045151419271901362/photo/1 - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 错过了吗：伊朗议员纳巴维安（Nabavian）表示，德黑兰计划对通过霍尔木兹海峡的商船征收费用。最新消息 🔴 伊朗议会成员马哈茂德·纳巴维安（Mahmoud Nabavian）：船只可以通过支付通行费通过。“随着邪恶的美国政权的撤退和对黎巴嫩停火协议的接受，一些商船将被允许通过支付通行费通过霍尔木兹海峡。” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045151419271901362/photo/1 - Open Source Intel 推文

text: Open Source Intel President Trump says Iran agreed to everything BREAKING: I just spoke with President Trump on the phone from Las Vegas and I asked him about the stream of Truth social posts he has been sharing. I got right to the point. I asked the President if Iran agreed to stop enriching uranium. "Yes," he told me. "They agreed to stop enriching uranium?" "They agreed to everything," he told me. "Yes, are you surprised?" I asked, "are you surprised?" He told me, "I'm not surprised by anything..." Then he said, "I'll see you later." And the call ended. - Kellie Meyer tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 特朗普总统说伊朗同意了一切 快讯：我刚在拉斯维加斯通过电话与特朗普总统交谈，我问他关于他一直在分享的Truth Social帖子流。我直奔主题。我问总统伊朗是否同意停止浓缩铀。“是的，”他告诉我。“他们同意停止浓缩铀了吗？” “他们同意了一切，”他告诉我。“是的，你感到惊讶吗？” 我问，“你感到惊讶吗？” 他告诉我，“我对任何事情都不感到惊讶……” 然后他说，“回头见。” 通话结束了。 - Kellie Meyer 推文

text_zh: OSINTdefender 美国总统唐纳德·J·特朗普感谢巴基斯坦及其总理夏巴兹·谢里夫（Shehbaz Sharif），以及巴基斯坦陆军参谋长阿西姆·穆尼尔（Asim Munir）元帅，称他们为“两个了不起的人！！！” https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2045149354172850514/photo/1 推文

text: 🇮🇷 An informed source close to Iran’s Supreme National Security Council told Iranian media details regarding the temporary reopening of the Strait of Hormuz. The source said Iran set three conditions for vessel passage through the Strait of Hormuz: ➡️ Ships must be commercial; military vessels are prohibited, and neither ships nor cargo may be linked to hostile countries. ➡️ Ships must pass through routes designated by Iran. ➡️ Vessel transit must be coordinated with Iranian forces responsible for this process; similar to how CENTCOM previously acknowledged IRGC management of the Strait of Hormuz before the war began. The source emphasized that implementation was dependent on conditions tied to the Lebanon ceasefire, and that if the maritime blockade continues, it would be considered a violation of the ceasefire and could lead to closure of the Strait of Hormuz. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 一位接近伊朗最高国家安全委员会的知情人士向伊朗媒体透露了关于霍尔木兹海峡临时重新开放的细节。消息人士称，伊朗为船只通过霍尔木兹海峡设定了三个条件：➡️ 船只必须是商业性质的；禁止军用船只，且船只或货物不得与敌对国家有关联。➡️ 船只必须通过伊朗指定的路线。➡️ 船只过境必须与负责此过程的伊朗部队协调；类似于中央司令部（CENTCOM）在战争开始前承认伊斯兰革命卫队（IRGC）对霍尔木兹海峡的管理。消息人士强调，实施取决于与黎巴嫩停火协议挂钩的条件，如果海上封锁继续，将被视为违反停火协议，并可能导致霍尔木兹海峡关闭。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇮🇷 Iran will charge a fee for the passage of commercial vessels through the Strait of Hormuz, Iranian Deputy Nabavian has stated. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 伊朗议员纳巴维安表示，伊朗将对通过霍尔木兹海峡的商船收取费用。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇷🇮🇱 Iran fired some 1,400 ballistic missiles in the war, only 39% at Israel. Interception rate was 84%, lower than in previous conflicts due to cluster warheads. Over 70% of impacts in Israel were from cluster missiles. Damage to Iranian industries…" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 The Lebanon ceasefire follows the “yellow line” model from Gaza. Some 55 Lebanese villages are inside the zone; civilians may not return, and the IDF may continue destroying infrastructure during the truce. Hezbollah fired about 8,000 rockets, only 2,500 at Israel, with just 75 hits. Drone interception rate was 92%. The IDF supports the ceasefire, believing it can lead to long‑term quiet if Israel remains within the yellow line and a US‑supervised demilitarisation mechanism is established. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇷🇮🇱 伊朗在战争中发射了约1400枚弹道导弹，只有39%针对以色列。拦截率为84%，由于集束弹头的原因，低于以往冲突。以色列境内超过70%的撞击来自集束导弹。对伊朗工业的损害……” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 黎巴嫩停火协议遵循了加沙的‘黄线’模式。约有55个黎巴嫩村庄位于该区域内；平民不得返回，IDF在停火期间可继续摧毁基础设施。真主党发射了约8000枚火箭弹，只有2500枚针对以色列，仅有75次命中。无人机拦截率为92%。IDF支持停火，认为如果以色列保持在黄线内并建立美国监督的非军事化机制，可以带来长期的平静。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇮🇷 Senior IDF officials warned the political echelon not to concede to Iran in nuclear talks. Iran is weak and beaten; the enriched uranium must be removed from the country and Iran must be permanently banned from enrichment. Asset freezes must not be…" ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇮🇱 Iran fired some 1,400 ballistic missiles in the war, only 39% at Israel. Interception rate was 84%, lower than in previous conflicts due to cluster warheads. Over 70% of impacts in Israel were from cluster missiles. Damage to Iranian industries is estimated at $100 billion, requiring years to rebuild. Israel dropped 19,000 heavy munitions on Iran, more than the US (17,000). @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇮🇷 以色列国防军高级官员警告政治层不要在核谈判中向伊朗让步。伊朗虚弱且已被击败；浓缩铀必须从该国移除，且必须永久禁止伊朗进行浓缩。资产冻结绝不能……” ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇮🇱 伊朗在战争中发射了约1400枚弹道导弹，只有39%针对以色列。拦截率为84%，由于集束弹头的原因，低于以往冲突。以色列境内超过70%的撞击来自集束导弹。对伊朗工业的损害估计为1000亿美元，需要数年时间重建。以色列向伊朗投下了19000枚重型弹药，超过了美国（17000枚）。 @wfwitness

text: 🇩🇪 “(Germany) is willing to make contribution to ensure freedom of navigation in The Strait of Hormuz” — Merz “As long as we have strong legal basis for it, If possible we would like to ensure participation by US”
text_zh: 🇩🇪 “（德国）愿意为确保霍尔木兹海峡的航行自由做出贡献” —— 默茨 “只要我们有强大的法律依据，如果可能的话，我们希望确保美国的参与”

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 Senior IDF officials warned the political echelon not to concede to Iran in nuclear talks. Iran is weak and beaten; the enriched uranium must be removed from the country and Iran must be permanently banned from enrichment. Asset freezes must not be lifted. If Iran refuses, Israel can strike again, including energy targets not yet hit. If ballistic missiles are not addressed, Iran could rebuild thousands within a few years. Iran still has many centrifuges; the most troubling issue is removing enriched uranium. The chance of regime collapse from air strikes was always low, but cracks are appearing. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 以色列国防军高级官员警告政治层不要在核谈判中向伊朗让步。伊朗虚弱且已被击败；浓缩铀必须从该国移除，且必须永久禁止伊朗进行浓缩。资产冻结绝不能解除。如果伊朗拒绝，以色列可以再次打击，包括尚未受损的能源目标。如果不解决弹道导弹问题，伊朗可能在几年内重建数千枚。伊朗仍有许多离心机；最令人担忧的问题是移除浓缩铀。空袭导致政权崩溃的可能性一直很低，但裂痕正在出现。 @wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 Seyed Mahmood Nabavian, a senior member of the Iranian parliament: The crossing is done after paying the fees.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 伊朗议会高级成员赛义德·马哈茂德·纳巴维安：过境需在支付费用后进行。

text: Iran’s conditions for ships passing through the Strait of Hormuz: Only commercial vessels are permitted—no military ships or cargo linked to “hostile” countries. Ships must use routes designated by Iran. All transit must be coordinated with Iranian authorities. Source: Tasnim
text_zh: 伊朗对船只通过霍尔木兹海峡的条件：仅允许商船通行——禁止军舰或与“敌对”国家有关的货物。船只必须使用伊朗指定的航线。所有过境必须与伊朗当局协调。来源：塔斯尼姆通讯社

text: The U.S. and Iran have made progress on a three-page agreement aimed at ending the war. Source: Barak Ravid
text_zh: 美国和伊朗在旨在结束战争的三页协议上取得了进展。来源：巴拉克·拉维德

text: 🇮🇹 Italy will provide naval units for Strait of Hormuz mission — Giorgia Meloni “It's in line with missions we've done in the past”
text_zh: 🇮🇹 意大利将为霍尔木兹海峡任务提供海军部队——乔治亚·梅洛尼：“这符合我们过去执行的任务。”

text: 🇬🇧 🇫🇷 UK and France announce independent mission to protect freedom of navigation through The Strait of Hormuz “Strictly peaceful and defensive mission to reassure commercial shipping and support mine clearance”
text_zh: 🇬🇧 🇫🇷 英法宣布独立任务以保护霍尔木兹海峡的航行自由：“严格的和平与防御性任务，旨在让商业航运放心并支持扫雷工作。”

text: ↩️ Reply to ResistanceTrench mirror: "🇮🇷 🇱🇧 During the Lebanon ceasefire, commercial vessel passage through the Strait of Hormuz is fully open via Iran’s designated route. — Iran’s FM Araghchi" 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 Explanation from a source about the temporary reopening of the Strait of Hormuz — Fars News Agency - A knowledgeable source revealed new dimensions of the Iran-US agreement under the two-week ceasefire regarding the Strait of Hormuz in an interview with Fars. - According to this source, from the beginning of the ceasefire plan mediated by Pakistan, Iran was supposed to allow the daily passage of a number of ships. - However, after the ceasefire was not implemented in Lebanon and the extension of the ceasefire agreement to Hezbollah and the Zionist regime was not accepted, Iran suspended the agreement on ship passage through the strait. - According to this source, Iran set three conditions for the passage of vessels through the Strait of Hormuz. 1. Ships must be commercial, military ships are prohibited, and neither the ships nor their cargo should be related to hostile countries. 2. Ships must pass through the route designated by Iran. 3. The passage of vessels must be coordinated with the Iranian forces responsible for this passage; just as CENTCOM had confirmed the management of the Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps over the Strait of Hormuz before the war began. - This source emphasized that this matter depended on the implementation of certain conditions and the ceasefire condition in Lebanon, and if the naval blockade continues, it will be considered a violation of the ceasefire and the passage route of the Strait of Hormuz will be closed.
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 ResistanceTrench 镜像：“🇮🇷 🇱🇧 在黎巴嫩停火期间，商船通过霍尔木兹海峡的通道已通过伊朗指定的路线完全开放。——伊朗外交部长阿拉格齐” 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 关于霍尔木兹海峡暂时重新开放的消息来源解释 —— 法尔斯通讯社 - 一位知情人士在接受法尔斯通讯社采访时透露了在两周停火协议下，伊朗与美国就霍尔木兹海峡达成的协议的新维度。 - 据该消息人士称，从巴基斯坦斡旋的停火计划开始，伊朗就应该允许一定数量的船只每日通行。 - 然而，在黎巴嫩未能实施停火，且将停火协议扩大到真主党和犹太复国主义政权的提议未被接受后，伊朗暂停了关于船只通过海峡的协议。 - 据该消息人士称，伊朗为船只通过霍尔木兹海峡设定了三个条件。1. 船只必须是商船，禁止军舰通行，且船只及其货物不得与敌对国家有关。2. 船只必须通过伊朗指定的路线。3. 船只通行必须与负责此通道的伊朗军队协调；正如中央司令部在战争开始前确认伊斯兰革命卫队对霍尔木兹海峡的管理一样。 - 该消息人士强调，此事取决于特定条件的执行以及黎巴嫩的停火条件，如果海上封锁继续，将被视为违反停火协议，霍尔木兹海峡的通行路线将被关闭。

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. President Trump says Iran won’t close the Strait of Hormuz again. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国总统特朗普表示，伊朗不会再关闭霍尔木兹海峡。 @wfwitness

text: Trump claims: Iran has agreed to never close the Strait of Hormuz again. It will no longer be used as a weapon against the World!
text_zh: 特朗普声称：伊朗已同意永远不再关闭霍尔木兹海峡。它将不再被用作对抗世界的武器！

text: 🇫🇷 French NAVY will secure the merchant ships going in West Asia — Macron
text_zh: 🇫🇷 法国海军将保护前往西亚的商船 —— 马克龙

text: Open Source Intel Germany's Merz: Iran must open the Strait of Hormuz without conditions. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045148662376837607/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 德国的默茨：伊朗必须无条件开放霍尔木兹海峡。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045148662376837607/photo/1 推文
